title: Codebase Audit: Full engineering review of bc project
description: Complete engineering audit of the bc agent orchestrator project. Review all packages, identify gaps in testing, incomplete implementations, code quality issues, and architectural concerns. Produce actionable findings that drive the next phase of development.

title: Audit: pkg/agent - test coverage and code review
description: Review pkg/agent/agent.go. Zero tests currently. Verify thread safety, SpawnAgent idempotency, state machine transitions, RefreshState task capture logic. Write findings.

title: Audit: dead code and unused features inventory
description: Identify all dead code, unused exports, stub implementations, and features defined in config but never used (e.g. cost tracking, workspace registry, verbose flag). Produce a cleanup list.

title: Audit: error handling and observability gaps
description: Review error handling patterns across the codebase. Identify: silent error swallowing (beads, github), ignored errors (tmux KillSession), missing error checks (os.Pipe). Check for structured logging, debug mode, and observability gaps.

title: Audit: write summary report with recommendations
description: After all audit subtasks are complete, compile findings into a summary. Categorize by severity (critical/high/medium/low). Produce prioritized recommendations for the next development phase. This is the final deliverable of the audit epic.

title: Audit: pkg/tmux - test coverage and code review
description: Review pkg/tmux/session.go. Zero tests. Verify session creation, SendKeys long-message path, workspace-scoped naming, ListSessions prefix filtering. Check for race conditions or resource leaks.

title: Audit: pkg/events - test coverage and code review
description: Review pkg/events/events.go. Zero tests. Check JSONL append logic, ReadLast correctness, unbounded log growth concern. Verify malformed line handling.

title: Audit: pkg/workspace - test coverage and code review
description: Review pkg/workspace/workspace.go and registry.go. Zero tests. Verify Find() upward search, Init() directory creation, registry pruning. Check if registry is actually used anywhere.

title: Audit: pkg/beads and pkg/github - integration review
description: Review pkg/beads/beads.go and pkg/github/github.go. Both have zero tests. Check silent error swallowing, verify CLI integration works, assess completeness (both are ~50-70% implemented). Document what's missing.

title: Audit: internal/cmd - CLI commands review
description: Review all commands in internal/cmd/. Check: init, up, down, status, attach, send, logs, queue, report, home, dashboard. Verify they handle errors, find workspace correctly, and have consistent UX. Only root.go has tests currently.

title: Audit: internal/tui - TUI screens completeness
description: Review internal/tui/. home.go references workspace.go and agent.go screens. Check if these files exist and are implemented. Assess whether the hardcoded TUI approach (vs streaming runtime) is the right path forward.

title: Audit: pkg/tui and pkg/tui/runtime - TUI framework review
description: Review the declarative TUI builder (pkg/tui/) and streaming runtime (pkg/tui/runtime/). Check: are DetailView/ListView/FormView implemented? Is modal rendering complete? Assess protocol correctness. Some tests exist already.

title: Audit: config and build system review
description: Review config/ package (cfgx-generated), config.toml, Makefile, go.mod, .golangci.yml, CI/CD. Check: is cost tracking config used anywhere? Are all Makefile targets working? Is go.mod clean? Any missing linter rules?
